properties.name: Al Dhafra Air Base
properties.description: USAF/UAE joint air base; home to F-35As and MQ-9s. First and primary ballistic missile target, Feb 28 first wave.

properties.name: Al Minhad Air Base
properties.description: UAE Air Force base south of Dubai; drone-wave target in Feb 28 evening wave. Interceptions prevented damage.

properties.name: Camp de la Paix, Zayed Port
properties.description: French military garrison at Zayed Military Port, Abu Dhabi. Ballistic fragment impact caused minor structural damage.

properties.name: US Consulate General Dubai
properties.description: US diplomatic facility struck by Shahed-136 loitering munition ~22:00 GST Feb 28. Windows blown out; no US personnel casualties initially reported.

properties.name: Dubai International Airport Terminal 3
properties.description: World's busiest international airport; Terminal 3 concourse roof struck by drone debris ~00:30 GST Mar 1. Airport suspended operations for 6 hours.

properties.name: Ruwais Industrial Complex
properties.description: ADNOC Ruwais refinery and petrochemical complex; Shahed-136 impact triggered fire and temporary ADNOC shutdown on Mar 2.

properties.name: Palm Jumeirah / Fairmont Hotel
properties.description: Luxury hotel on Palm Jumeirah trunk; windows shattered by interceptor shrapnel on Feb 28 night.

properties.name: Burj Al Arab
properties.description: Iconic sail-shaped hotel; fragment from intercepted ballistic warhead impacted upper helipad on Mar 1.

properties.name: 23 Marina Tower
properties.description: Dubai Marina residential skyscraper; interceptor debris caused balcony damage on upper floors on Feb 28.

properties.name: Jebel Ali Port
properties.description: World's 9th busiest port; warehouse fire triggered by descending ballistic debris in early hours of Mar 1. Temporary closure.

properties.name: Dubai Creek Harbour
properties.description: Mixed-use development near Downtown Dubai; drone debris landed in marina basin on Mar 1.

properties.name: DIFC Innovation Hub
properties.description: Financial district tech hub; glass facade damage from pressure wave of nearby interception on Mar 2.

properties.name: Al Barsha Residential District
properties.description: Residential suburb of Dubai; falling missile casing caused Mar 3 fatality and multiple injuries in street.

properties.name: Fujairah Free Zone
properties.description: East-coast industrial free zone; drone debris landed in logistics yard on Mar 4. No casualties.
